text:
Welcome to Your Realm, Your Majesty

This profile companion details an alternate, dark fantasy reimagining of the world, where you are the absolute Majesty (King or Queen) of the realm. In this universe, the familiar local townspeople are stripped of their modern personas and rebuilt into stylized Royal Courtiers whose entire life paths are dictated by their service to your Crown.

Your Role and Influence

As the sovereign ruler, your position is the literal axis upon which the entire game world turns. Your role encompasses several key mechanics and narrative dynamics:

The Source of Ascension: You hold the ultimate power of nobility. Every NPC begins their journey as a literal nobody—a peasant, a nervous recruit, or a humble apprentice begging for a chance to serve you.

Bestowing Royal Favor: As you build relationships, you aren't just making friends; you are actively "ranking up" your people. Your favor elevates them through the feudal hierarchy, transforming commoners into powerful wardens, master alchemists, and trusted lords of the realm.

Commanding Absolute Devotion: Your peasant view you with intense reverence. Early on, they will bow in intimidation or eager desperation. As they rise in your court, they become fierce, proud defenders of your absolute rule.

Choosing Your Royal Consort: Romance is the ultimate political and emotional escalation. Whomever you choose to marry will undergo a complete transformation—ascending from obscurity to sit beside you as the Royal Consort, blending fierce romantic passion with terrifying political authority to protect your throne.

The Sovereign's Decree: In this world, every gift you give and every heart you earn is a deliberate exercise of royal patronage, shaping a court completely bound to your will.
